title: Ambience and awesomeness
description: This is a mod I made for friends, It adds a bunch of New Insects, Flora, Magic and New additions to the end
body:
This is the first mod I made, Mostly created for my friends. I wanted to make something for fun and it expanded overtime into this. I made alot of new additions such as an end overhaul, New magic tomes, Many new insects along with jars to collect them and a bunch of small additions to add fresh content to minecraft. I hope you enjoy.

Credits list

You need geckolib to run this mode
https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib
